subject: [PATCH v5 18/21] nfsd: add the filehandle to returned attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new routine to compose a filehandle for use in CB_NOTIFY operations, where there is no export to consult. The routine uses the parent filehandle and nfs4_file to fill out the fhandle field in the nfsd4_fattr_args structure. This allows the filehandle to be returned as an attribute in CB_NOTIFY responses.
